zh.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran於1486年出生。她和James Hamilton, Earl of Arran至少有1個女兒。她去世於1522年在英國蘇格蘭費伏可希享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran于1486年出生。她和James Hamilton, Earl of Arran至少有1个女儿。她去世于1522年在英国苏格兰費伏可希享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .
English: variant of   Betton  .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

variants.name: Countiss
meanings: English: variant of   Countess  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Arran
meanings: Ara, kidney, and "an" for tan, land, riches, possessions in land or stock, meaning the land of the kidney

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran was born in 1486. She had at least 1 daughter with James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. She died in 1522, in Creich, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran est née en 1486. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Creich, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran wurde 1486 geboren. Sie hatte mit James Hamilton, Earl of Arran mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Creich, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran è nata il nel 1486. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. Morì nel 1522, nel Creich, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arranは1486年に生まれた。彼女はJames Hamilton, Earl of Arranとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1522年にイギリススコットランドフィフクレイチで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran(은)는 1486년 태어났다. 그녀는 James Hamilton, Earl of Arran(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 크레이치에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Creich, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom: Creich, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran nasceu em 1486. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Creich, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran родилась в 1486 г. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности краич, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Bethune, Countess of Arran nació en 1486. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con James Hamilton, Earl of Arran. Murió en 1522, en Creich, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
